items.scenario: You are a third-year economics major. You recently received a low grade on your midterm essay for a development economics seminar, and you believe the rubric was applied inconsistently because you followed the assigned outline closely.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Marlow. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your specific concerns about the grading
Explain how your essay followed the rubric
Ask for a brief meeting to discuss possible revisions
items.subject: Question about midterm essay grading for ECON 312

items.scenario: You started a part-time internship at a small architecture firm last month. Your supervisor recently introduced a new digital review process for project drawings, and you have noticed that some files lose their layer labels when uploaded.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Albright. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the technical issue you observed
Explain how it has affected your weekly drawing reviews
Suggest a temporary workaround until the issue is fixed
items.subject: Layer-label issue with the new drawing review portal

items.scenario: You are a regular weekend visitor to the Hartwood Community Garden, where members rent small plots to grow vegetables. The garden coordinator recently announced a new policy that limits each member to one watering session per week, and many members feel this is too strict.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Garrison. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the once-weekly watering limit is causing problems
Describe specific plants that need more frequent watering
Suggest a more flexible policy based on plant type
items.subject: Concern about the new watering policy at Hartwood Garden

items.scenario: You recently ordered a wireless mechanical keyboard from an online retailer. After three weeks of use, several keys have stopped responding consistently, and the battery now drains within four hours instead of the advertised forty.
items.direction: Write an email to the Aspen Peripherals support team. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the specific malfunctions you have encountered
Mention the order number and purchase date
Ask whether you qualify for a replacement or a full refund
items.subject: Defective keys and short battery life on order #AP-90217
